description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named tests that runs on every push to main and develop branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10). For each version, check out the repository with submodules, set up Python, install graphviz and dependencies from requirements.txt, run tests with nose2 and coverage, and upload coverage to Coveralls.
